name: Grilled Salmon with Surf Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a skillet over medium heat. Add margarine and sauté mushroom slices until golden brown.
2. Reduce the heat to low. Stir in half a cup of barbecue sauce, thawed shrimp, and horseradish. Heat thoroughly, stirring constantly.
3. OUTDOORS: Place salmon steaks on a greased grill over low coals (ash-gray). Grill, uncovered, 6 to 8 minutes on each side or until the fish flakes easily with a fork. Brush frequently with remaining barbecue sauce. Serve with shrimp mixture.
4. INDOORS: Place salmon steaks on a greased rack in a broiler pan. Broil for 5 minutes on each side or until the fish flakes easily with a fork. Brush frequently with remaining barbecue sauce. Serve with shrimp mixture.
